Input
NIMR-2201
R04 - Data Integrity
planned td vs planned spud
planned_tdplanned_spud
ⓘ Claude ✓
Correct data error in BP – planned_td must be ≥ planned_spud + estimated_drilling_days. Ensure drilling plan dates align with operational timelines.
•planned_td is set to before planned_spud, which is physically impossible. This blocks automated KPI calculations for this well.
 OVERDUE 2d

Risk Actions Required
Mandatory interventions for high/critical workers
Risk LevelAction Required
● Low (0–2.0)Standard monitoring
● Moderate (2.1–4.0)Enhanced monitoring, supervisor briefing
● High (4.1–6.0)Restrict to lower-risk tasks, mandatory training
● Critical (6.1+)Work suspension pending review, intervention plan
